## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem it Solves
What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution
Your proposed approach or implementation idea.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you considered.

## Phase
Which project phase is this for?
- [ ] Phase 1 — Data Collection
- [ ] Phase 2 — Feature Engineering
- [ ] Phase 3 — ML Development
- [ ] Phase 4 — Backend
- [ ] Phase 5 — Frontend
- [ ] Phase 6 — Extension
- [ ] Phase 7 — Testing
- [ ] Phase 8 — Deployment
- [ ] Future Enhancement

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or references.
